team_id.desc: The ID of the workspace or organization.

user_id.desc: The ID of the user to designate as an admin.

desc: Set an existing regular user or owner to be a workspace or org admin.

errors.cannot_modify_primary_owner: The primary owner cannot be modified.

errors.invalid_permissions: This method is only accessible by org owners and admins.
